note: Static bundle_id → upstream map for Indigo plugins. Every entry has `name`. Entries may carry `github` (user/repo slug — preferred upstream), `store_url` (Indigo plugin store detail page), and/or `store_download` (direct download URL from the store, useful as a fallback when the GitHub release has no .indigoPlugin.zip asset).
source: Scraped from https://www.indigodomo.com/pluginstore/ detail pages on 2026-04-15. Contribute additions or corrections via PR to simons-plugins/indigo-claude-plugin.
